nasb.text: And not only this, but there was Rebekah also, when she had conceived twins by one man, our father Isaac;

esv.text: And not only so, but also when Rebekah had conceived children by one man, our forefather Isaac,

cnv.text: 不但如此，利百加也是這樣：既然從一個人，就是從我們的祖宗以撒懷了孕，

ccb.text: 后来，利百加和我们的先祖以撒结婚，怀了双胞胎。

csbs.text: 不仅如此，丽贝卡也是这样。她由一个人，就是由我们的先祖以撒怀了孕。
